name: CN Healthy Food Tech Group Corp.
summary: CN Healthy Food Tech Group Corp. (UCFI) is a China-based holding company whose subsidiaries develop, manufacture, and market premium health foods using AI-powered biotechnology and traditional Chinese medicine principles. Products include peptide selenium powders, herbal plant beverages, and biotech-derived nutritional supplements derived from whole grains, Cordyceps, bird's nest, ginseng, and Ganoderma. The Group operates an online/offline omnichannel sales model with business bases in Heilongjiang and Guangdong provinces.

products.name: Cordyceps Peptide Selenium Powder
products.description: Bio-enzymatic hydrolysis-derived peptide and selenium supplement from high-quality Cordyceps for efficient nutritional absorption.

products.name: Baofei Granule Extract Plant Beverage
products.description: Micro-nano extracted beverage from eight traditional Chinese medicinal ingredients for pulmonary health management.

products.name: Yanxu Peptide Selenium Premium Powder
products.description: Small-molecule active peptide complex from bird's nest with sialic acid and selenium for skin, sleep, and energy support.

products.name: Ganoderma and Matsutake Peptide Selenium Powder
products.description: Bio-enzymatic peptide complex from Ganoderma lucidum and Matsutake with selenium for metabolic balance and daily nutrition.

products.name: Panax Ginseng Peptide Selenium Concentrate Powder
products.description: Directed bio-enzymatic hydrolysis peptide complex from ginseng and American ginseng enriched with ginsenosides and polysaccharides.
